rationale: The citing paper studies bid-level behavior and latent bidder quality in reverse procurement auctions, while the cited paper is a structural cognitive-hierarchy study of ISP technology adoption; the overlap is only a broad theme of strategic heterogeneity in decision makers. With only a DOI-level match and no in-text citation context (empty reference title/unstructured fields), there is not enough evidence to confidently classify this as either clearly substantive or clearly incidental.
